daily.title: koala73/worldmonitor
daily.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
daily.author: koala73
daily.summary: 该项目是一个实时全球情报仪表盘，通过AI整合新闻聚合、地缘政治监控和基础设施跟踪，提供统一的态势感知界面。

daily.title: bojieli/ai-agent-book
daily.description: 《深入理解 AI Agent：设计原理与工程实践》（李博杰 著）开源主仓库：全书正文、编译版 PDF 与按章配套代码
daily.author: bojieli
daily.summary: 该项目提供《深入理解 AI Agent：设计原理与工程实践》一书的全文、编译版 PDF 和按章配套代码的开源仓库。

daily.title: tirth8205/code-review-graph
daily.description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
daily.author: tirth8205
daily.summary: 这个项目是一个本地优先的代码智能图工具，通过构建代码库的持久映射，帮助AI编码工具仅读取相关代码，从而在代码审查和大仓库工作流中减少上下文。

daily.title: ayghri/i-have-adhd
daily.description: A skill for your coding agent to stop it from burying the answer. ADHD-friendly output.
daily.author: ayghri
daily.summary: 该项目为编程助手提供了一种技能，使其能够输出简洁直接的答案，避免冗长解释，适合注意力不易集中的人群。

daily.summary: 一个将文本描述转换为CAD模型的代理技能集合，适用于机器人和硬件设计。

monthly.title: MadsLorentzen/ai-job-search
monthly.description: The job search that runs on your machine. AI job application framework built on Claude Code: evaluate postings, tailor CVs, write cover letters, prep interviews. Fork it and own it.

monthly.summary: 这是一个基于Claude Code的AI求职框架，能在本地运行，帮助用户评估职位、定制简历、撰写求职信和准备面试。

monthly.title: calesthio/OpenMontage
monthly.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
monthly.author: calesthio
monthly.summary: OpenMontage是一个开源的视频制作系统，通过12条流水线、52个工具和500多个代理技能，将AI编码助手转变为完整的视频制作工作室。

monthly.author: usestrix
monthly.summary: Strix 是一个开源的 AI 渗透测试工具，用于发现和修复应用程序的漏洞。

monthly.title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
monthly.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
monthly.author: DeusData
monthly.summary: 这个项目是一个高性能的代码智能 MCP 服务器，通过将代码库索引为持久知识图，支持 158 种语言，实现亚毫秒级查询并减少 99% 的令牌。

monthly.title: catchorg/Catch2
monthly.description: A modern, C++-native, test framework for unit-tests, TDD and BDD - using C++14, C++17 and later (C++11 support is in v2.x branch, and C++03 on the Catch1.x branch)
monthly.author: catchorg
monthly.summary: Catch2是一个用于单元测试、TDD和BDD的现代C++原生测试框架，主要支持C++14及以上版本，并提供分支兼容C++11和C++03

monthly.title: kunchenguid/no-mistakes
monthly.author: kunchenguid
monthly.summary: 该Git项目通过在推送前自动检查代码错误，帮助开发者避免将错误提交到远程仓库。

monthly.title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
monthly.description: Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Kimi, Claude, GPT, OpenAI, Gemini, GLM, DeepSeek, MiniMax. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors
monthly.author: diegosouzapw
monthly.summary: OmniRoute 是一个免费开源的 AI 网关，通过单一端点聚合 268 多个提供商和 500 多种模型，并具备配额感知自动回退与 token 压缩功能。

monthly.title: stablyai/orca
monthly.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop, mobile and VPS.
monthly.author: stablyai
monthly.summary: Orca 是一个用于管理并行代理集群的智能体开发环境，支持在桌面、移动端和 VPS 上使用自有订阅运行各类编码代理。

monthly.title: ogulcancelik/herdr
monthly.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
monthly.author: ogulcancelik
monthly.summary: 这个项目是一个运行在终端中的智能体复用器，用于在命令行环境下同时管理和交互多个AI代理。

monthly.title: Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
monthly.description: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai ) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows. Understand How to write meeting minutes
monthly.author: Zackriya-Solutions
monthly.summary: 这是一个隐私优先的AI会议助手，基于Rust构建，提供4倍速实时转录、说话人分离和Ollama总结功能，所有处理完全本地化，无需云端，支持macOS和Windows。

news.title: 证据感知强化学习克服长上下文推理中的重复复制问题
news.original_title: Copy Less, Ground More: Overcoming Repetitive Copying in Long-Context Reasoning via Evidence-Aware Reinforcement Learning
news.summary: 大语言模型在复杂任务中通过逐步推理取得了强性能，但在长上下文环境下，模型常会逐字复制整个上下文，导致重复且低效的推理轨迹。为此，提出证据感知强化学习（EARL）框架，鼓励模型直接定位并引用相关证据而非复制大段文本。实验表明，EARL能有效减
news.original_summary: Large language models that generate step-by-step reasoning traces have achieved strong performance on complex tasks, and extending them to long-context settings has emerged as an important frontier. However, we identify
